sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na aerodrom rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the airport early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: انْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ مَكَانِ اسْتِلَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Čekao sam svoju torbu na mjestu za preuzimanje prtljaga.
sentences.translationEn: I waited for my bag at the baggage claim area.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْجَوَازَاتِ لِخَتْمِ التَّأْشِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga sam otišao do pasoške kontrole radi ovjere vize.
sentences.translationEn: After that, I went to the passport office to stamp the visa.

sentences.arabic: أَخِيرًا، رَكِبْتُ حَافِلَةً لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى مَرْكَزِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju sam se ukrcao u autobus kako bih otišao do centra grada.
sentences.translationEn: Finally, I took a bus to go to the city center.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ الرِّحْلَةُ مُتْعِبَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا مُمْتِعَةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Putovanje je bilo naporno, ali veoma ugodno.
sentences.translationEn: The trip was tiring but very enjoyable.
